intended_use: Spectral Bone Marrow is an automated image processing software application, utilizing deep learning technology for bone segmentation, to facilitate optimized visualization of bone marrow in spectral b
intended_use_full: Spectral Bone Marrow is an automated image processing software application, utilizing deep learning technology for bone segmentation, to facilitate optimized visualization of bone marrow in spectral body and extremity CT images. Spectral Bone Marrow's output can be used during the review of traumatic and non-traumatic bone pathologies.
ground_truth: Ground truth for bone segmentation validation was generated by three US board certified radiologists
other_metrics: Bone segmentation algorithm demonstrated ability to accurately segment bones based on ground truth comparison from three US board certified radiologists; clinical assessment validated diagnostic value and increased reader efficiency on Likert scale
